{"id":"providence-rdk","title":"SLICE-1: Bestiary API additions + tag v0.1.0","description":"---
references:
  impl_plan: providence-dem
  urd: providence-tul
  proposal: providence-mnq
---
## Specification
Add two new exported functions to bestiary registry.go and tag v0.1.0.

## Repo
/home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/bestiary/main/

## Files Owned
- registry.go — add LookupModelByProvider, Models
- registry_test.go — add tests

## Detailed Requirements

### LookupModelByProvider(p Provider, name string) (ModelInfo, bool)
Search staticModels for a model matching both provider AND name.
Return the model and true if found, zero value and false otherwise.

### Models() []ModelInfo
Return all available models (static + synced). For now, delegates to StaticModels().
This is the preferred API for callers (vs StaticModels which is implementation detail).

### Tag v0.1.0
After implementation and tests pass, tag the commit as v0.1.0.

## Acceptance Criteria
Given LookupModelByProvider(ProviderAnthropic, "claude-opus-4-6") when model exists then returns (ModelInfo, true)
Given LookupModelByProvider(ProviderGoogle, "claude-opus-4-6") when wrong provider then returns (zero, false)
Given Models() when called then returns same content as StaticModels() (defensive copy)
Given git tag when v0.1.0 created then go get github.com/dayvidpham/bestiary@v0.1.0 works

## Validation Checklist
- [ ] LookupModelByProvider function added
- [ ] Models function added
- [ ] Tests pass (CGO_ENABLED=0 go test -count=1 ./...)
- [ ] v0.1.0 tag created and pushed","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dayvidpham@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-04T17:29:08Z","created_by":"David Huu Pham","updated_at":"2026-04-04T17:29:08Z"}

{"id":"providence-4bb","title":"SLICE-2: Provider string + ModelID type","description":"---
references:
  impl_plan: providence-dem
  urd: providence-tul
  proposal: providence-mnq
  uat: providence-7e7
---
## Specification
Switch Provider from type Provider int (iota) to type Provider string. Add type ModelID string. Update ModelEntry.Name from string to ModelID. Fix enums_test.go. Re-export ModelID.

## Repo
/home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/provenance

## Files Owned
- pkg/ptypes/enums.go — Provider section (lines 290-342): change to type Provider string, update constants to string values, rewrite String/MarshalText/UnmarshalText/IsValid with case-insensitive switch
- pkg/ptypes/models.go — add type ModelID string, change ModelEntry.Name from string to ModelID
- pkg/ptypes/enums_test.go — fix TestProviderRoundTrip (remove int(p) casts), fix TestProviderStringValues (remove int(p)), fix TestEnumOutOfRangeFallback Provider(99) line
- reexports.go — add ModelID type alias

## Detailed Requirements

### Provider string switch (pkg/ptypes/enums.go)
```go
type Provider string

const (
    ProviderAnthropic Provider = "anthropic"
    ProviderGoogle    Provider = "google"
    ProviderOpenAI    Provider = "openai"
    ProviderLocal     Provider = "local"
)
```

String() returns string(p).
MarshalText() returns []byte(p) after IsValid check.
UnmarshalText() normalizes to lowercase, matches against known values.
IsValid() uses switch on strings.ToLower(string(p)) — case-insensitive per UAT amendment.

### ModelID type (pkg/ptypes/models.go)
```go
type ModelID string
```
ModelEntry.Name changes from string to ModelID.

### enums_test.go fixes
- TestProviderRoundTrip: remove int(p) cast in error messages, use %s or %q
- TestProviderStringValues: remove int(c.p) cast  
- TestEnumOutOfRangeFallback: Provider(99) is no longer valid Go (can't convert int to string type). Replace with Provider("unknown_provider").String() → should return "unknown_provider"

### reexports.go
Add: type ModelID = ptypes.ModelID

## Acceptance Criteria
Given Provider("anthropic") when calling String() then returns "anthropic"
Given Provider("ANTHROPIC") when calling IsValid() then returns true (case-insensitive)
Given Provider("unknown") when calling IsValid() then returns false
Given ModelID("claude-opus-4-6") when used in ModelEntry then compiles
Given enums_test.go when all Provider tests run then no int(p) casts, all pass

## Validation Checklist
- [ ] type Provider string compiles
- [ ] Constants use string values matching bestiary
- [ ] IsValid() case-insensitive via strings.ToLower switch
- [ ] type ModelID string added
- [ ] ModelEntry.Name is ModelID
- [ ] ModelID re-exported in reexports.go
- [ ] enums_test.go int(p) and Provider(99) rewritten
- [ ] CGO_ENABLED=0 go build ./... passes
- [ ] CGO_ENABLED=0 go test -count=1 ./pkg/ptypes/ passes","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dayvidpham@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-04T17:29:29Z","created_by":"David Huu Pham","updated_at":"2026-04-04T17:29:29Z"}

{"notes":"## Task ID Reference

### Slices
- SLICE-0: providence-pjh (go get bestiary)
- SLICE-1: providence-rdk (bestiary APIs + tag)
- SLICE-2: providence-4bb (Provider string + ModelID)
- SLICE-3: providence-jyr (adapter + registry swap)
- SLICE-4: providence-6bc (SQLite queries)
- SLICE-5: providence-gxt (remaining tests)

### Leaf Tasks
- SLICE-1: L1=providence-ohi, L2=providence-ltk, L3=providence-lle
- SLICE-0: L1=providence-fux, L2=providence-vgb, L3=providence-bnu
- SLICE-2: L1=providence-w0s, L2=providence-96m, L3=providence-2ce
- SLICE-3: L1=providence-2n8, L2=providence-7pr, L3=providence-df4

- SLICE-5: L1=providence-i5i, L2=providence-aty, L3=providence-p5a

### Waves
- Wave 1: SLICE-1 + SLICE-2 (parallel)
- Wave 2: SLICE-0 (after SLICE-1)
- Wave 3: SLICE-3 + SLICE-4 (parallel, after deps)
- Wave 4: SLICE-5 (after all)"}

{"id":"providence-dem","title":"IMPL_PLAN: Bestiary integration into provenance","description":"---
references:
  request: providence-7n7
  urd: providence-tul
  proposal: providence-mnq
  handoff: providence-8fc
  uat: providence-7e7
---
## Summary
Integrate dayvidpham/bestiary as the model data source for dayvidpham/provenance.

## Horizontal Layers (TDD)
- L1: Types and interfaces (Provider string, ModelID string, adapter signature)
- L2: Tests first (import production code, expected to fail until L3)
- L3: Implementation (make tests pass)

## Vertical Slices

### SLICE-1: Bestiary API additions (cross-repo)
**Repo**: /home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/bestiary/main/
**Files**: registry.go, registry_test.go
**Scope**: Add LookupModelByProvider(Provider, string) and Models() to bestiary. Tag v0.1.0.
**Integration**: Must complete before Slice 0 can run.

### SLICE-0: go get bestiary dependency
**Repo**: /home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/provenance
**Files**: go.mod, go.sum
**Scope**: go get github.com/dayvidpham/bestiary@v0.1.0
**Integration**: Depends on Slice 1 (tag must exist). Required by Slice 3.

### SLICE-2: Provider string + ModelID type
**Repo**: /home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/provenance
**Files**: pkg/ptypes/enums.go (Provider section), pkg/ptypes/models.go, pkg/ptypes/enums_test.go, reexports.go
**Scope**: Switch Provider from int to string with case-insensitive IsValid. Add ModelID string type. Update ModelEntry.Name to ModelID. Fix enums_test.go int casts.
**Integration**: Foundational for Slices 3, 4, 5. Independent of bestiary import.

### SLICE-3: Adapter + registry swap
**Repo**: /home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/provenance
**Files**: adapter.go (NEW), models.go, models_test.go, reexports.go
**Scope**: Create RegistryFromBestiary adapter. Rename defaultRegistry → inMemoryRegistry. Add NewRegistry([]ModelEntry). Update DefaultModelRegistry to use bestiary.Models(). Update models_test.go.
**Integration**: Needs Slice 0 (bestiary in go.mod) + Slice 2 (string Provider, ModelID).

### SLICE-4: SQLite query updates
**Repo**: /home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/provenance
**Files**: internal/sqlite/db.go (seedMLModels), internal/sqlite/agents.go (RegisterMLAgent, GetMLAgent), internal/sqlite/db_test.go
**Scope**: Replace int(provider) casts with provider name subselect. GetMLAgent JOINs providers table, reads p.name via ColumnText(3). Fix db_test.go.
**Integration**: Needs Slice 2 (string Provider).

### SLICE-5: Remaining test updates
**Repo**: /home/minttea/codebases/dayvidpham/provenance
**Files**: demo_test.go, tracker_test.go, internal/testutil/fixtures.go
**Scope**: Update all remaining test files to use ModelID for model names. Update testutil.TestModels(). Verify CGO_ENABLED=0 go test -count=1 ./... passes.
**Integration**: Needs all prior slices.

## Dependency Graph
```
SLICE-1 (bestiary APIs) ──── must complete first
    │
SLICE-0 (go get)         ── needs tag from Slice 1
    │
SLICE-2 (Provider/ModelID) ── parallel with Slice 0
    │
    ├──► SLICE-3 (adapter) ── needs Slice 0 + Slice 2
    │
    └──► SLICE-4 (SQLite)  ── needs Slice 2
              │
              ▼
         SLICE-5 (tests)  ── needs all prior
```

## Integration Points
- IP-1: SLICE-2 exports Provider (string) and ModelID types → consumed by SLICE-3, SLICE-4, SLICE-5
- IP-2: SLICE-0 makes bestiary importable → consumed by SLICE-3
- IP-3: SLICE-3 changes DefaultModelRegistry() behavior → affects SLICE-5 test expectations
- IP-4: SLICE-4 changes SQLite queries → affects SLICE-5 db_test.go","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dayvidpham@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-04T17:28:46Z","created_by":"David Huu Pham","updated_at":"2026-04-04T17:28:46Z"}
